basic_details.organization_name: Translational Health Science and Technology Institute (THSTI)
basic_details.short_information: Translational Health Science and Technology Institute (THSTI) has officially announced a Walk-in Interview for the recruitment of 5 Project Associates Posts. This walk-in drive offers a great opportunity for candidates looking for government jobs. Candidates with Master's degree in any branch of Life Sciences, M.Tech./M.Pharm., Ph.D. in any branch of Life Sciences qualification can directly attend the interview on 12 May 2026.

age_limit.details: Project Associate-II: 35 years Senior Project Associate: 40 years Principal Project Associate: 40 years Age relaxation is applicable as per government rules: SC/ST: 5 years, OBC: 3 years, PwBD (UR:10 years, OBC:13 years, SC/ST:15 years), Central Government servants: 5 years, Ex-servicemen: extent of service + 3 years, Institute employees: extent of service.

qualification.education_qualification: Master's degree in any branch of Life Sciences, M.Tech./M.Pharm., Ph.D. in any branch of Life Sciences
qualification.details: Project Associate-II: M.Tech./ M.Pharm. or Master's degree in any branch of Life Sciences from a recognized university with at least two (2) years of post-qualification research experience. Senior Project Associate: Master’s degree in any branch of Life Sciences from a recognized university with at least four (4) years’ of post-qualification experience in Microbiology. Principal Project Associate: Master’s degree in any branch of Life Sciences from a recognized university with at least eight (8) years’ of post-qualification experience in the field of Microbiology. OR Ph.D. in any branch of Life Sciences or equivalent degree from a recognized university, with at least four (4) years’ of post-qualification experience in the field of Microbiology.

salary_details.pay_scale: Rs. 28,000/- + HRA - Rs. 49,000/- + HRA Per Month
salary_details.details: Project Associate-II: Rs. 35,000/- +HRA (NET/GATE qualified) / Rs. 28,000/- + HRA (others) Per Month Senior Project Associate: Rs. 42,000/- + HRA Per Month Principal Project Associate: Rs. 49,000/- + HRA Per Month

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for Project Associate-II?
faq.answer: The last date to request a virtual interview for Project Associate-II is 7 May 2026. The walk-in interview for all posts is scheduled for 12 May 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What are the educational qualifications required for the Project Associate posts?
faq.answer: Candidates should possess a Master's degree in any branch of Life Sciences, M.Tech./M.Pharm., or a Ph.D. in any branch of Life Sciences. Specific post requirements may vary.

faq.question: Q3. How many vacancies are available for Project Associates at THSTI?
faq.answer: There are a total of 5 vacancies for Project Associates announced by THSTI.

faq.question: Q4. What is the application fee for these positions?
faq.answer: There is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for these positions.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary range for the Project Associate positions?
faq.answer: The salary ranges from Rs. 28,000/- + HRA to Rs. 49,000/- + HRA per month, depending on the specific post and qualifications.

faq.question: Q6. Where will the walk-in interview be held?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be held at Translational Health Science and Technology Institute (THSTI) in Faridabad, Haryana (Pincode: 121001).

faq.question: Q7. What documents should I carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates must carry all original documents, self-attested photocopies, and recent passport-size photographs. A duly filled application form might also be required.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any age relaxation for reserved categories?
faq.answer: Yes, age relaxation is applicable for SC/ST (5 years), OBC (3 years), and PwBD candidates as per government norms.

faq.question: Q9. What is the selection process for these posts?
faq.answer: The selection process typically includes a Written Test, Skill Test, and Interview.

faq.question: Q10. Can I apply for a virtual interview if I cannot attend in person?
faq.answer: Yes, for the Project Associate-II post, candidates can request a virtual interview by 7 May 2026. For other posts, attending the walk-in interview in person is expected.
